explanation: Added a single global PyTorch matmul precision setting before training starts. On Ampere+ GPUs this allows float32 GEMMs to use TF32 tensor cores, improving dense matmul throughput without changing the model, optimizer, or loss.

changes.description: Enable TF32-friendly matmul precision at program start.
changes.original_snippet: # get default config and overrides from the command line, if any
changes.new_snippet:
torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high') # profine: tf32_matmul

    # get default config and overrides from the command line, if any

warnings: This can introduce small numerical drift relative to strict fp32 matmuls.
